summary: A rectangular fortification structure with thick stonebrick walls, a flat roof topped with dark wood/nether brick layers, and a central courtyard. The building features buttress-like corner pillars and a single entrance. The structure appears to be a defensive bunker or small fort with an open interior courtyard design.

shape.overall_form: rectangular hollow structure with central courtyard

rebuild_hints: Construct outer rectangular wall frame using stonebrick, approximately 16×20 blocks
Create hollow interior courtyard space, leaving walls 2-3 blocks thick
Place buttress pillars at corners and mid-wall points using cobblestone
Build flat roof structure at height 5-6 blocks
Cap roof with 2-3 layers of nether brick slabs in stepped pattern
Create single entrance opening on front face, approximately 2 blocks wide
Floor courtyard interior with stone slabs
Add foundation blocks around perimeter base
uncertainties: Exact interior courtyard dimensions uncertain from angles provided
Precise number of roof capping layers difficult to count definitively
Interior wall height and any internal structures not clearly visible
Exact block count for buttress pillars requires closer inspection
Whether structure has multiple floors or is single-story unclear
